name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, unmonitored software license usage causes unnecessary expenses. We provide alerts for potential cost savings instead of manual tracking of software licenses.
problem_solved: High software license costs due to unmonitored usage.
